creator: hsn@sendmail.cz
text:
Messages written into "dmesg" kernel buffer are not synchronized. If crashes
more than 1 process at once, they become garbled.

pid 67147 (httpd), uid 1003: exited on signal 11
pid 3819 (httpd), uid 1003: exited on signal 11
pid 67155 (httpd), uid 1003p: iedxi ted on6 s71i4g1na l( htt1p1d)
,
 uid 1003: exited on signal 11
pid 9450 (troff), uid 1013: exited on signal 6 (core dumped)
